body: Use timezone-aware datetimes like datetime.now(UTC); a naive timezone comparison caused a flaky test here before.
Never swallow an exception with a bare except that only passes; log and re-raise instead. A silent failure hid a bug for days.
Do not use a mutable default argument such as def f(x=[]); use None and create inside the function. Shared mutable state bit us before.
Batch database lookups: the reporting endpoint had an N+1 query that timed out. Use a single IN query instead.
Prefer f-strings over percent formatting in log messages for readability.
Keep import blocks sorted; isort runs in CI and will fail an unsorted file.
Name test modules test_<module>.py so pytest discovers them automatically.
